title: psychotria acutigemma subsp. couvreuriana
intro: Psychotria acutigemma subsp. couvreuriana is a subspecies of the Psychotria acutigemma plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily in Central and South America, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria acutigemma subsp. couvreuriana include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various infections, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
